core_rule: Create folders, architecture guide files inside 00_SYSTEM_INDEX, and questionnaire files inside each folder only. Do not create detailed empty project documents before the folder questionnaire is answered.
word_file_rule: All .docx files must be valid Word documents. Architecture guide and questionnaire files must contain useful starter content. Do not create zero-byte or corrupted .docx files.
ai_instruction: When this generator is given to an AI assistant, create a compressed ZIP project skeleton according to this JSON. Do not generate detailed folder documents yet. Detailed documents are generated later from answered folder questionnaires.

layers.core: Essential planning and execution folders required to understand and build the first usable version.
layers.production: Operational readiness folders used for security, design, QA, deployment, monitoring, analytics, and support.
layers.extension: Future growth folders used to plan optional modules and post-launch extensions without damaging the core.
layers.archive: Superseded or deprecated material that must not be used as current source of truth.

description: Small AI-ready project skeleton with the minimum planning and execution folders needed to start safely.

folders.purpose: Project entry point, architecture guide, version notes, and instructions for using the skeleton.
folders.detailed_documents_policy: Do not create detailed documents in this folder until the folder questionnaire is answered and sent to AI.
